page: Amazon Web Services c9gd.8xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance powered by custom AWS Graviton ARM64 processors. It features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.8 GHz, with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is not utilized. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core.

For local storage, the c9gd.8xlarge includes 1900 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes directly attached to the Nitro hypervisor. This local storage configuration supports high-speed read and write operations directly on the physical host. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 17 Gbps, facilitating efficient data transfer rates for distributed environments.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ARM64 architecture combined with dedicated physical cores offers a highly efficient compute-to-power ratio compared to traditional x86 architectures. The integration of high-capacity local NVMe storage reduces the need for external network-attached storage for temporary data. This hardware profile is suited for compute-intensive workloads that require fast local scratch space, such as distributed analytics, database hosting, and batch processing.
description: Amazon Web Services c9gd.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by 32 dedicated AWS Graviton ARM64 physical cores running at 2.8 GHz. It features 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 2.0 GB per core, and is built on the Nitro hypervisor. The instance includes 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 17 Gbps. Lacking hyperthreading, each of its 32 vCPUs maps to a dedicated physical core, ensuring consistent compute performance. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring a balance of high-performance ARM compute and fast local storage, such as database hosting, data analytics, and batch processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c9gd.8xlarge is a compute-optimized ARM64 server featuring 32 dedicated Graviton cores, 64 GB of RAM, 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 17 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

tagline: An ARM64 compute-optimized server featuring dedicated physical cores and high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage for intensive data processing.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
1900 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage
17 Gbps baseline network bandwidth managed by the Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for database hosting, batch processing, and distributed analytics
